eligibility_summary:

title: Economic Transformation for Inclusive Growth Project
scope_summary: Travaux de réhabilitation de bâtiment pour la Maison des Plateformes à Fort-Dauphin, Région Anosy. Les soumissionnaires doivent soumettre leurs offres en respectant les exigences du Règlement de Passation des Marchés de la Banque Mondiale. Une Garantie d'offre est requise. Une visite des lieux est organisée le 05 Mai 2026, bien que non obligatoire. Les offres doivent être remises physiquement avant la date limite.
project_program: PROJET DE TRANSFORMATION ECONOMIQUE POUR UNE CROISSANCE INCLUSIVE (PIC3) - Crédit IDA78730
eligibility_summary:
• Ouvert à tous les soumissionnaires éligibles
• Garantie d'offre requise
• Visite des lieux encouragée mais non obligatoire
submission_process: Les offres doivent être remises physiquement à l'adresse indiquée avant le 15 Mai 2026 à 10 heures. La soumission électronique n'est pas autorisée. Les offres seront ouvertes en présence des représentants des soumissionnaires le même jour.

title: Africa Think Tank Platform Project
scope_summary: The consulting services include conducting a feasibility study for the Endowment Fund and designing a resource mobilization strategy for the Africa Think Tank Platform Endowment Fund. The assignment aims to enhance the capacity and influence of think tanks across Africa. The project focuses on key themes such as economic transformation, climate change, regional trade, food security, human capital, and digitalization. The beneficiary of this project is the African Union Commission. The consulting firm must comply with World Bank procurement regulations and guidelines.
project_program: THE AFRICA THINK-TANK-PLATFORM (ATTP) PROJECT — Grant No: P180117
eligibility_summary:
• Firm's core business
• Firm's years of general business experience
• Relevant similar experience of the firm in the assignment
• Technical and managerial capability of the firm
submission_process: Expressions of interest must be delivered in written form to the African Union Commission by in person, mail, or e-mail. The submission must be made by 15 May 2026.

title: Peru: Strengthening of the Public Health Emergency Preparedness and Response
scope_summary: El servicio de consultoría requerido es la supervisión de la obra para la Sede Institucional del Centro Nacional de Epidemiología Prevención y Control de Enfermedades - CDC. La firma supervisora debe tener experiencia en supervisión de obras de construcción y/o ampliación de establecimientos de salud. Se requiere que la firma haya completado al menos tres servicios de supervisión en los últimos quince años y dos obras similares en los últimos diez años. El plazo estimado para la prestación de los servicios es de 480 días calendario. El beneficiario de este servicio es el Ministerio de Salud del Perú.
project_program: Fortalecimiento del Sistema Nacional de Vigilancia en Salud – INS
eligibility_summary:
• Mínimo 3 servicios de supervisión en los últimos 15 años
• Mínimo 2 obras similares en los últimos 10 años
• Supervisión de obras de salud de al menos 10,000 m2
submission_process: Las expresiones de interés deben ser enviadas por correo electrónico con los formularios debidamente llenados. Las firmas pueden asociarse para mejorar sus calificaciones. Es importante indicar en el asunto del correo: 'Remite Expresión de Interés al Servicios de Consultoría'.

title: Vietnam Scaling Up Energy Efficiency Project
scope_summary: The consulting services involve supporting the development of energy management systems and capacity building for stakeholders in Vietnam's industrial and energy sector. Key tasks include providing guidance in developing management procedures aligned with the Energy Management System model and enhancing system implementation through certification assessments. The project aims to address regulatory barriers and mobilize financing for energy efficiency investments. The beneficiary is the VSUEE Project Management Board, which is implementing the Vietnam Scaling Up Energy Efficiency Project.
project_program: Vietnam Scaling Up Energy Efficiency Project (VSUEE Project) — GCF Grant
eligibility_summary:
• Proper business license for certification activities
• Min 5 years experience in energy efficiency consultancy
• At least 1 relevant assignment in training/capacity building in last 5 years
• Accredited for certification audit services per ISO standards
• Licensed for Energy Management System assessments
• Experience in certification/recertification audits
• Knowledge of government policies on energy efficiency
submission_process: Interested Consultants should submit their expressions of interest demonstrating qualifications and relevant experience. The detailed Terms of Reference can be obtained by requesting via the provided email addresses.

title: Angola Strengthening Governance for Enhanced Service Delivery Project
scope_summary: The contract involves hiring two firms for the revision of the PDM of Viana and the preparation of the PDMs of Mulenvos, Calumbo, and Sequele. The consulting services aim to regulate land use and occupation in favor of public interest, ensuring safety and well-being of citizens. The project is focused on developing municipal master plans in the provinces of Luanda and Cuanza Sul. The contract duration is ten months, and it is essential for the firms to comply with established guidelines for urban growth and environmental protection. The beneficiary of this project is the Government of Angola.
project_program: Angola Strengthening Governance for Enhanced Service Delivery Project — P178040
eligibility_summary:
• Min 5 yrs experience in drafting Municipal Master Plans
• Similar projects in sub-Saharan Africa
• Consultancy firm with relevant qualifications
submission_process: Expressions of interest must be delivered in writing to the Ministry of Territorial Administration by 3:00 PM on May 15, 2026. Submissions can be made in person, by post, or via e-mail.

title: CAR- Public Sector Digital Governance Project
scope_summary: Le projet consiste à recruter une firme internationale pour appuyer les Unités de Recherche Géologique et Minière (URGM) en République Centrafricaine. Les principales tâches incluent l'acquisition de données géo-scientifiques par télédétection, géophysiques et géochimiques, ainsi que l'analyse et l'interprétation de ces données. La firme devra également actualiser les cartographies géologiques et minières du pays. Le bénéficiaire de ce projet est le Ministère des Mines et de la Géologie (MMG). Les travaux se concentreront sur une zone pilote dans les régions des plateaux et de l'équateur.
project_program: Projet de Gouvernance Numérique du Secteur Public (PGNSP) — P174620-Don IDA D9950-CF
eligibility_summary:
• Expertise avérée en acquisition de données géo-scientifiques
• Expertise en traitement et analyse de données géo-scientifiques
• Expérience en Afrique ou contexte institutionnel similaire
• Maîtrise des standards internationaux (ISO, OGC, ESF)
• Expérience en transfert de compétence institutionnel
submission_process: Les manifestations d'intérêt doivent être rédigées en français et déposées par courrier ou par mail au plus tard le 15 mai 2026 à 15h30. Les dossiers doivent comprendre une description de la firme, ses qualifications techniques et toute documentation pertinente. Les soumissions doivent être limitées à 30 pages.

title: Angola Digital Acceleration Project
scope_summary: Consultoria para a Implementação de Interoperabilidade da Administração Pública. Os serviços incluem: acompanhamento técnico do alinhamento arquitectural e conformidade das implementações, apoio na gestão de riscos técnicos, análise das evidências técnicas dos fornecedores, e avaliação da prontidão operacional da plataforma. O beneficiário é o Instituto de Modernização Administrativa (IMA). O projeto está localizado em Angola.
project_program: Projecto de Aceleração Digital de Angola — IBRD-P080
eligibility_summary:
• Mínimo 5 anos de experiência em consultoria técnica relacionada com interoperabilidade
• Participação em pelo menos 2 projetos comparáveis nos últimos 5 anos
• Experiência com administrações públicas ou entidades com elevados requisitos de segurança
• Capacidade de mobilizar e coordenar equipas técnicas multidisciplinares
• Experiência em projetos financiados por organismos internacionais é uma mais-valia
• Experiência prévia em Angola ou na África Austral será valorizada
submission_process: As manifestações de interesse devem ser entregues por escrito por e-mail até 15 de Maio de 2026. Consultores podem se candidatar em associações, indicando se é um consórcio ou subcontratação.

title: Honduras Sustainable Connectivity Project
scope_summary: Se busca contratar un consultor individual como Especialista en Monitoreo y Evaluación (M&E) para el Proyecto de Conectividad Sostenible de Honduras. Las tareas principales incluyen el diseño e implementación de sistemas de M&E en proyectos de inversión pública, preferiblemente en infraestructura vial. El consultor deberá tener experiencia en la elaboración de informes de seguimiento y en el manejo de indicadores de desempeño. El beneficiario de estos servicios es la Secretaría de Infraestructura y Transporte (SIT) de Honduras. Se espera que el consultor trabaje bajo presión y en un equipo multidisciplinario.
project_program: Proyecto de Conectividad Sostenible de Honduras — P181166 (Crédito 7672-HN)
eligibility_summary:
• Título universitario en Economía, Ingeniería, Estadística, Administración Pública o campos afines
• Mínimo 5 años de experiencia en M&E en proyectos de inversión pública
• Al menos 2 años de experiencia en informes de seguimiento de proyectos de infraestructura
• Experiencia en manejo de indicadores de desempeño y reportes técnicos
• Deseable experiencia en proyectos financiados por el Banco Mundial o BID
• Conocimiento avanzado en Microsoft Project y software estadístico
• Habilidad para trabajar en equipo multidisciplinario
submission_process: Las expresiones de interés deben ser enviadas por escrito a la dirección indicada, ya sea personalmente, por correo o por correo electrónico, a más tardar el 15 de mayo de 2026 hasta las 4:00 pm. Se requiere que los consultores interesados detallen su experiencia profesional y perfil académico en su hoja de vida.

title: Jobs, Social Cohesion and Community Resilience in Northern Mozambique - Phase I
scope_summary: The Procurement Specialist will ensure the efficient and transparent acquisition of goods, works, and services for the Jobs, Social Cohesion, and Community Resilience in Northern Mozambique Phase I project. Key responsibilities include preparing and updating the Project Procurement Plan, developing procurement strategies, and conducting training for implementing agency staff. The Specialist will liaise with the World Bank to ensure compliance with procurement guidelines and manage procurement processes throughout the project cycle. The project is located in Northern Mozambique, specifically in the provinces of Nampula, Niassa, and Cabo Delgado.
project_program: Jobs, Social Cohesion, and Community Resilience in Northern Mozambique Phase I – P514199
eligibility_summary:
• Bachelor's or Master's degree in relevant fields
• At least 10 years of procurement experience
• Minimum 5 years in World Bank financed projects
• Understanding of World Bank Procurement Regulations
submission_process: Interested Consultants must provide information demonstrating their qualifications and relevant experience. The submission should adhere to the guidelines set forth in the World Bank's Procurement Regulations for IPF Borrowers.

title: Sava and Drina Rivers Corridors Integrated Development Program
scope_summary: The assignment involves an independent dam safety review of the Modrac dam and its appurtenant structures. The consultant will inspect and assess the safety condition of the dam, ensuring its operational integrity and safety. The review will include evaluating proposed rehabilitation works and preparing a dam safety assessment report with recommendations for remedial works. The consultant must also familiarize themselves with previous independent reviews and relevant technical documents. The mission duration is set at two months.
project_program: Sava and Drina Rivers Corridors Integrated Development Program (SDIP) — P168862 (Loan No. 95670-BA)
eligibility_summary:
• Min 20 yrs experience in dam design and safety review
• Participation in design of at least 3 large dams
• Conducted at least 2 dam safety inspections
• Experience with arch or buttress dams
• Familiarity with dam safety guidelines
• Proficiency in English; Bosnian desirable
submission_process: Interested Consultants should provide information demonstrating their qualifications and relevant experience. Submissions must be made electronically, and the detailed Terms of Reference are available on the Ministry's website.

title: Ethiopia Digital ID for Inclusion and Services Project
scope_summary: The deliverable is the provision of consulting services by a Senior Special Regional Implementation Advisor for the National ID Program stationed in the Afar Region of Ethiopia. The main tasks include fostering collaboration between the national program office and regional stakeholders, supporting ID enrollment campaigns, and promoting public awareness of the digital identity system. The advisor will coordinate with various entities and facilitate communication to ensure effective implementation of registration activities. The beneficiary is the National ID Program, which aims to enhance digital identity adoption in the region.
project_program: Ethiopia Digital ID for Inclusion and Services Project — P179040
eligibility_summary:
• Master's or Bachelor's degree in relevant fields
• Experience in similar roles
• Strong communication skills
• Ability to engage with stakeholders
• Knowledge of public administration or IT preferred
submission_process: Interested Consultants should submit their expressions of interest demonstrating their qualifications and relevant experience. The submission should be in English and may include both physical and electronic formats. There is a possibility of extension based on performance.

title: Somalia productive, resilient, and inclusive growth (SPRING) project
scope_summary: The procurement is for a Communications Specialist for the Somalia Productive, Resilient, and Inclusive Growth (SPRING) project. The specialist will develop and implement the project communication strategy, ensuring consistent messaging across stakeholders and media. Key tasks include producing communication materials, coordinating events, and supporting reporting and visibility of results. The project aims to enhance the visibility of the SPRING initiative to stakeholders and the international community. The beneficiary is the Federal Government of Somalia through its Ministry of Finance.
project_program: Somalia Productive, Resilient, and Inclusive Growth (SPRING) — P501662
eligibility_summary:
• Bachelor's degree in communication or related field
• At least 5 years of relevant experience
• Strong communication skills in English and Somali
• Experience in media relations and stakeholder engagement
• Proven ability to develop communication strategies
submission_process: Interested Consultants should submit their Expression of Interest along with their Curriculum Vitae (CV). Submissions should be made in accordance with the guidelines set out in the World Bank's Procurement Regulations. The submission must be completed by the deadline of May 16, 2026, at 4:00pm.

title: Somalia productive, resilient, and inclusive growth (SPRING) project
scope_summary: The procurement is for an Enterprise Risk Management (ERM) Expert for the Central Bank of Somalia. The expert will conduct a comprehensive ERM maturity assessment, enhance risk governance structures, and develop a multi-year ERM enhancement roadmap. The role includes training staff and promoting a strong risk culture within the institution. This assignment is part of the Somalia Productive, Resilient, and Inclusive Growth (SPRING) project, which aims to improve the business-enabling environment and strengthen the financial system. The assignment is expected to last for twelve months.
project_program: Somalia Productive, Resilient, and Inclusive Growth (SPRING) — P501662
eligibility_summary:
• Master's degree in economics, finance, or related field
• At least 8 years of experience in enterprise risk management
• Strong knowledge of international ERM frameworks
• Proven experience in ERM implementation
• Experience in training and institutional capacity building
• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
• Good communication skills
submission_process: Consultants are invited to submit their expressions of interest along with their Curriculum Vitae (CV). The submission should demonstrate the required qualifications and relevant experience. Further information can be obtained in person or by e-mail.

title: Food Systems Resilience Program for Eastern and Southern Africa (Phase 3) FSRP
scope_summary: The contract involves the construction of the Bonkay Agricultural Research Station (BARS) for the Ministry of Agriculture and Irrigation in Baidoa Town, Baidoa District, Somalia. The project aims to enhance agricultural research capabilities in the region. Bidders are required to complete the construction within a specified timeframe of eighteen months. The procurement process follows National Competitive Procurement guidelines as per World Bank regulations. The beneficiary of this project is the Ministry of Agriculture and Irrigation of the Federal Government of Somalia.
project_program: Somalia Food Project (S-FSRP) — P177816 (Grant No. IDA-E1850)
eligibility_summary:
• Open to all eligible bidders as defined in the Procurement Regulations
• Must submit a Bid-Securing Declaration
• Must include a Sexual Exploitation and Abuse (SEA) and/or Sexual Harassment (SH) Declaration
submission_process: Bids must be delivered physically to the specified address on or before 16th May 2026 at 11:30am Mogadishu, Somalia time. Electronic bidding is not permitted. Late bids will be rejected, and bids will be publicly opened in the presence of designated representatives of the bidders.

title: Innovative Private Sector Development II
scope_summary: The tender is for Market Linkages Advisory and Investor & B2B Facilitation Services under the Innovative Private Sector Development II (IPSD II) project. The main tasks include providing advisory services to enhance market linkages and facilitate business-to-business interactions. The geographic scope is Ramallah, where the services will be delivered. Proposals must be submitted electronically, and firms must ensure compliance with the specified requirements. The beneficiary of these services is the IPSD II project.
project_program: Innovative Private Sector Development Project II (IPSD II)
eligibility_summary:
• Only consultancy firms/consortiums can submit proposals
• Lead firm required for consortiums
• Proposals must be valid for 120 days
• Compliance with RFP terms and conditions
submission_process: Proposals must be submitted electronically via email by May 17, 2026, at 4:00 PM Ramallah time. Firms must send two separate files in separate emails: one for the technical proposal and another for the financial proposal. The RFP number and title must be included in the subject line of the emails.

title: Lebanon Green Agrifood Transformation for Economic Recovery (GATE)
scope_summary: The consulting firm will develop a comprehensive Lending Manual for Kafalat's SME lending activities under the GATE Project. This includes designing the SME lending framework, developing Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), establishing a credit policy, and integrating Environmental & Social (E&S) requirements. The firm will also provide training to Kafalat staff and support the pilot implementation of initial SME loans. The project is focused on enhancing access to finance for SMEs in the agri-food and agri-tourism sectors in Lebanon.
project_program: Green Agri-food Transformation for Economic Recovery (GATE Project) - IBRD 95760-LB
eligibility_summary:
• At least 10 years of relevant experience in financial sector consulting
• Proven experience in developing lending manuals or credit frameworks
• Experience with banks or microfinance institutions
• Familiarity with World Bank-funded projects
• Experience with loan management systems
• Knowledge of Environmental & Social standards
• Regional experience in Lebanon or MENA region is an advantage
submission_process: Interested consulting firms must submit Expressions of Interest including company profile, relevant experience, technical capabilities, and CVs of key experts. Submissions should be delivered in physical format by the deadline.

title: Burkina Faso Digital Acceleration Project
scope_summary: Le présent avis concerne le recrutement d'un cabinet pour le suivi-contrôle des travaux de réalisation des liaisons fibres optiques au Burkina Faso. Les tâches principales incluent le suivi des travaux de génie civil et des câbles à fibres optiques, ainsi que le contrôle des prestations relatives à l'installation et à la mise en service des équipements du réseau. Le cabinet devra également assister l'administration dans les opérations de réception technique et provisoire des contrats. La mission se déroulera sur plusieurs axes, avec une durée estimée de 11 mois pour la plupart des travaux. Le bénéficiaire de cette mission est le projet PACTDIGITAL du Gouvernement du Burkina Faso.
project_program: Projet d'accélération de la transformation digitale du Burkina Faso (PACTDIGITAL) - IDA
eligibility_summary:
• Expérience pertinente dans le suivi de projets similaires
• Références de prestations réalisées au cours des 5 dernières années
• Capacité à travailler en groupement
• Justificatifs des expériences requises
submission_process: Les consultants intéressés doivent soumettre une lettre de manifestation d'intérêt, une présentation de la firme et des références de prestations pertinentes. Les dossiers doivent être datés et signés, et inclure des pièces justificatives pour l'évaluation. Les soumissions doivent être faites en format physique ou électronique, selon les instructions fournies.

title: South Sudan Resilient Livestock Sector Project
scope_summary: The consulting services required are for a Monitoring and Evaluation Expert to support the South Sudan Resilient Livestock Sector Project (RLSP). The expert will lead the design and implementation of the project's M&E/MEAL system, ensuring alignment with project objectives. Responsibilities include establishing a Monitoring Information System, organizing M&E capacity-building activities, and preparing progress reports for stakeholders. The project aims to enhance animal health and strengthen livestock production resilience in targeted counties across South Sudan. The beneficiary is the Ministry of Livestock and Fisheries.
project_program: South Sudan Resilient Livestock Sector Project (RLSP) — P500553 (IDA Grant IDA-E4270-SS)
eligibility_summary:
• Master's Degree in relevant fields
• 8 years' experience in M&E
• 5 years in large-scale projects
• Experience with World Bank or similar projects
• Proficiency in M&E technology
• Computer literacy including Microsoft packages
• Experience in food security is an advantage
submission_process: Expressions of Interest should be submitted electronically. Interested candidates must request the detailed Terms of Reference via email, clearly indicating the subject matter as 'ToR for Monitoring and Evaluation Expert'.

title: Support for Resilient Livelihoods in the South of Madagascar - MIONJO Project
scope_summary: Le projet consiste à recruter un consultant pour fournir des services de secrétariat en passation de marchés. Les tâches principales incluent la gestion des documents, l'archivage électronique, et l'utilisation de logiciels de traitement de texte. Le consultant doit avoir une expérience pertinente et des qualifications spécifiques. La mission se déroule à Antananarivo, Madagascar. Les candidats doivent soumettre leur dossier avant la date limite indiquée.
eligibility_summary:
• Diplôme minimum Bacc +3 en administration ou domaine similaire
• Au moins 2 ans d'expérience en secrétariat ou assistance
• Expérience en archivage électronique
• Maîtrise des logiciels Word, Excel, PowerPoint
• Maîtrise du français et malgache
• Bonne capacité rédactionnelle et d'analyse
submission_process: Les manifestations d'intérêt doivent inclure une lettre de motivation, un CV détaillé, et des copies des diplômes. Les soumissions peuvent être faites en personne, par la poste, ou par courriel. Les documents doivent être rédigés en français et envoyés au Coordonnateur du Projet MIONJO avant le 18 mai 2026.

title: South Sudan Resilient Livestock Sector Project
scope_summary: The consulting services required are for a Project Accountant to support the South Sudan Resilient Livestock Sector Project (RLSP). The consultant will provide accounting and financial management support in compliance with the Financing Agreement and World Bank rules. Key tasks include preparing Annual Work Plans and Budgets, reviewing payment vouchers, and supporting audits. The project aims to enhance animal health and strengthen livestock production in selected areas of South Sudan, benefiting 166,000 households across five states. The consultant will work within the Ministry's Project Coordination Unit in Juba.
project_program: South Sudan Resilient Livestock Sector Project (RLSP) — P500553 (IDA Grant E4270-SS)
eligibility_summary:
• Min Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, or related field
• 5 years' experience in financial management
• Familiarity with World Bank and AfDB guidelines
• Fluency in English and local language
• Professional accounting qualifications preferred
submission_process: Expressions of Interest should be submitted electronically, clearly indicating the subject as 'ToR for Project Accountant'. Further details on the Terms of Reference can be requested via email.

title: South Sudan Resilient Livestock Sector Project
scope_summary: The consulting services required are for an Administrative Assistant to support the Ministry of Livestock and Fisheries in South Sudan. The Assistant will manage administrative, logistics, transport, and security needs for the Project Coordination Unit (PCU). Key responsibilities include overseeing resource use, planning work for project support staff, and maintaining office equipment. The project aims to enhance animal health and strengthen livestock production resilience in targeted counties. The beneficiary is the Ministry of Livestock and Fisheries, with a focus on supporting daily office operations.
project_program: South Sudan Resilient Livestock Sector Project (RLSP) — P500553 (IDA Grant E4270-SS)
eligibility_summary:
• Minimum Bachelor's degree in Commerce, Economics, Finance/Accounting, or related field
• At least 5 years of experience as an Administrative Assistant
• Fluent in English, both written and spoken
• Experience in a development project setting
• Proficiency in office technology
• Good communication skills
• Initiative and resourcefulness
submission_process: Expressions of Interest should be submitted in writing, clearly indicating the subject as 'ToR for Administrative Assistant'. The submission must be in English, and further details can be obtained upon request.

title: Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Human Capital Investment Project
scope_summary: The procurement involves supplying and delivering Menstrual Hygiene (MHH) Kits to Government Girls High Schools in the districts of Peshawar, Nowshera, Swabi, and Haripur. Bidders can submit bids for one or all lots as defined in the request for bids document. The project is part of the Human Capital Investment Project under the Elementary and Secondary Education Department of the Government of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa. The bidding process is national competitive procurement, and bids must comply with the World Bank's procurement regulations. The kits are intended to support the education and health needs of schoolgirls.
project_program: KHYBER PAKHTUNKHWA HUMAN CAPITAL INVESTMENT PROJECT (KP-HCIP) (EDUCATION) — IDA 67140/IDA-D6800
eligibility_summary:
• Open to all eligible bidders as defined in the Procurement Regulations
• Compliance with World Bank's Procurement Regulations
• Bid Security required for each lot
submission_process: Bids must be delivered physically to the specified address on or before 11:30 am, 18th May 2026. Electronic bidding is not permitted. Late bids will be rejected, and bids will be publicly opened at 11:45 am on the same day in the presence of designated representatives.

title: South Sudan Resilient Livestock Sector Project
scope_summary: The consulting services required are for Project Drivers who will operate vehicles for official purposes within Juba and to project sites as needed. Responsibilities include basic vehicle maintenance, keeping records of vehicle use, and performing miscellaneous office support functions. The project aims to enhance animal health and strengthen livestock production resilience in South Sudan. The beneficiaries are 166,000 households across eight counties in five states. The project is part of the South Sudan Resilient Livestock Sector Project funded by the World Bank.
project_program: South Sudan Resilient Livestock Sector Project (RLSP) — P500553 (IDA Grant IDA-E4270-SS)
eligibility_summary:
• Valid South Sudan motor vehicle driving license
• At least Secondary Education
• Fluent in English and basic Juba Arabic
• Min 7 years driving experience
• South Sudanese national
• Basic computer skills
submission_process: Expressions of Interest should be submitted in written form, clearly indicating the subject as 'Project Drivers'. The detailed Terms of Reference can be requested via email. The submission must comply with the World Bank's Procurement Regulations.

title: Social Protection Modernization and Economic Inclusion Project
scope_summary: The Ministry of Labor, Migration and Employment of the Republic of Tajikistan intends to hire an Individual Consultant for Designing an Impact Evaluation of the Economic Inclusion Program (EIP) in Tajikistan. The consultant will develop a detailed evaluation methodology, including a refined theory of change, sampling strategy, randomization process, data collection instruments, and a pre-analysis plan. The design must allow for the credible measurement of the program's impact on key household welfare indicators. The assignment will require the consultant to spend extended periods in Tajikistan for research and consultations. The project aims to support the Government of Tajikistan in protecting poor and vulnerable households and improving social protection systems.
project_program: Social Protection Modernization and Economic Inclusion Project — P178878 (Grant No. E1600-TJ)
eligibility_summary:
• Advanced degree in Economics, Statistics, or related field
• Min 5 years in designing impact evaluations
• Proven experience with quasi-experimental methods
• Proficiency in statistical software
• Fluency in English mandatory
• Familiarity with Tajikistan's socio-economic context
• Ability to work under tight deadlines
submission_process: Expressions of interest must be delivered or sent to the Ministry of Labor, Migration and Employment by May 18, 2026, before 15:00 Dushanbe time. Interested consultants should provide information indicating their qualifications and experience related to the task.

title: Senegal River Valley Development and Resilience Project
scope_summary: Acquisition de groupes électro motopompe et installation d'un système photovoltaïque pour appuyer les groupements de producteurs des communes cibles du Projet de résilience et de Développement communautaire de la Vallée du Fleuve Sénégal (PRDC-VFS). Le marché est divisé en trois lots : Lot 1 pour la région de Saint-Louis, Lot 2 pour la région de Matam, et Lot 3 pour la région de Tambacounda. Les soumissionnaires doivent prouver leur capacité technique et financière, y compris des états financiers certifiés et des lignes de crédits bancaires. Les équipements doivent être installés conformément aux exigences techniques spécifiées. Le bénéficiaire est le Projet de résilience et de Développement communautaire de la Vallée du Fleuve Sénégal.
project_program: Projet de résilience et de Développement communautaire de la Vallée du Fleuve Sénégal (PRDC-VFS) - Prêt/Crédit IDA N° 74990
eligibility_summary:
• États financiers certifiés des 3 dernières années
• Chiffre d'affaires minimum de 2,9 milliards FCFA pour le lot 1
• Chiffre d'affaires minimum de 2,6 milliards FCFA pour le lot 2
• Chiffre d'affaires minimum de 2,4 milliards FCFA pour le lot 3
• Ligne de crédits bancaires émise par une banque agréée
• Preuve de capacités techniques et d'expériences
• Moyens matériels spécifiques requis

O consultor será responsável por aumentar a visibilidade do projeto, apoiar a implementação da Estratégia e dos Planos de Ação de Comunicação, e coordenar as comunicações internas e externas. Specifically, it includes Lot-1, which covers the New Addis Center 132/15 kV GIS substation and extensions of several existing substations, and Lot-2, which includes the New Gurara kV GIS substation and extensions of additional existing substations. The project is part of the Addis Ababa Power Supply Reinforcement Project. The contract duration is expected to be 730 days, plus a 365-day defect liability period. The beneficiary of this project is the Ethiopian Electric Power.
project_program: Power Sector Reform, Investment and Modernization in Ethiopia (PRIME-1) - Additional Finance, Credit No.: IDA 75200
eligibility_summary:
• Min 10 yrs experience in power sector
• Avg annual turnover USD 46M for Lot-1, USD 52M for Lot-2
• Financial resources: USD 7M for Lot-1, USD 8M for Lot-2
• At least 2 substation contracts of 132 kV for Lot-1
• At least 2 substation contracts of 230 kV for Lot-2

title: Iraq Social Safety Net Enhancement Project
scope_summary: The procurement involves the design, supply, and installation of a Cash Transfer Program (CTP) Management Information System (MIS) for the Social Protection Commission (SPC) in Iraq. The main tasks include creating a new SPC CTP MIS and mobile application, ensuring integration with the Single Registry, and upgrading the existing system for enhanced adaptive capacity. The project aims to facilitate rapid responses to expansion and shocks, and to improve poverty inclusion across various programs under the Ministry of Labor and Social Affairs (MOLSA). The beneficiary of this project is the Ministry of Labor and Social Affairs / Social Protection Commission.
project_program: Iraq Social Safety Net Enhancement Project (SSNSP) — Grant No.: P178824

title: Great Lakes Trade Facilitation and Integration Project
scope_summary: Le marché concerne les travaux d'aménagement et de modernisation du Poste Frontière à Arrêt Unique de MPARAMBO au Burundi. Les principaux ouvrages incluent des bureaux administratifs, des services d'immigration, des blocs d'inspection pour piétons et véhicules, ainsi que des logements pour le personnel. Des aménagements généraux tels qu'une aire de circulation et un parking sont également prévus, ainsi que des équipements spéciaux d'inspection. Le démarrage des travaux est prévu pour octobre 2026, avec une durée de construction de 14 mois. Le bénéficiaire est le Ministère des Ressources Minières, Energétiques, de l'Industrie, du Commerce et du Tourisme.

title: JAMAICA: SOCIAL PROTECTION FOR INCREASED RESILIENCE AND OPPORTUNITY (SPIRO)
scope_summary: The consultancy aims to develop the Labour Market Information System (LMIS) IT Systems for the Ministry of Labour & Social Security (MLSS) in Jamaica. The system will automate key components of the new business process model and enhance public employment services (PES) for job seekers and employers. It will facilitate data sharing among institutions and support the implementation of the new Unemployment Insurance Scheme. The project includes twelve months of systems development followed by twelve months of warranty and implementation support services. The beneficiary is the Jamaican population, specifically job seekers and employers.
